name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed output typical of AI tools.
problem: Professionals waste hours fighting generic AI slide output that looks templated and unconvincing. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the gap between AI-assisted speed and the design quality expected in high-stakes business presentations. It lets teams move fast without sacrificing the visual credibility their audience expects.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with a distinctive, non-generic aesthetic
Creating internal strategy presentations quickly without a designer
Producing client-facing proposals that reflect brand standards
Turning written reports or briefs into structured slide narratives
